source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A piston/cylinder device keeping a constant pressure has 1 kg water at 20\circ\text{C} and 1 kg of water at 100\circ\text{C}, both at 500 kPa separated by a thin membrane. The membrane is broken and the water comes to a uniform state, with no external heat transfer. Find the entropy generation for the process.

The membrane is broken and the water comes to a uniform state, with no external heat transfer. Find the entropy generation for the process.
